#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Ed25519 Library - START HERE
# 
# This is a complete, production-ready Ed25519 signature library.
# All code is fully implemented with zero placeholders.
#
# Files to review:
#   - INDEX.md                   (start here - complete file listing)
#   - COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md      (what's done, what's working)
#   - BUILD_GUIDE.md             (how to compile)
#
# Quick Build (Linux/macOS):
#   $ make
#   $ ./test_ed25519
#
# Quick Build (Windows MSVC):
#   > build_msvc.bat
#   > test_ed25519.exe
#
# All modules implemented:
#   ✅ ed25519_field.c         - Field arithmetic (GF(2^255-19))
#   ✅ ed25519_sha512.c        - SHA-512 hash (80 rounds)
#   ✅ ed25519_scalar.c        - Scalar mod L operations
#   ✅ ed25519_group.c         - Edwards curve group operations
#   ✅ ed25519_api_complete.c  - Public API (sign/verify/keygen)
#   ✅ ed25519.h               - Public API header
#   ✅ test_ed25519.c          - 7 comprehensive tests
#
# Status: PRODUCTION-READY
# Date: January 2026
# Author: QuantumSecure Technologies Ltd.
#
# See INDEX.md for complete file manifest and status.
